title: Docker absent env → smoke backend docker-build non exécutable
detail: Le smoke gate T19 (docker compose build backend) ne peut pas tourner sans Docker. Code correct mais task forcée needs-review. Les smokes uvicorn restent viables via override DATABASE_URL=sqlite (psycopg2 absent du venv), ce qui a permis PASS sur T21/T22/T23.

title: share.py:19 param 'request' collision SlowAPI → /share/save HTTP 500
detail: Le param body Pydantic nommé 'request' entre en collision avec l'exigence SlowAPI (request doit être starlette.Request) quand le limiter est actif. Root cause des 13 échecs préexistants de test_share.py. Fix probable: renommer le body + mettre 'request: Request' en premier param. Cible: task code /shika-speccer.

title: spatial_gap_threshold_m non câblé endpoint→service
detail: T22 a ajouté spatial_gap_threshold_m à MergeOptions (défaut 500, bornes OK) mais la valeur n'est pas propagée depuis l'endpoint /gpx/merge vers le service (gpx.py + gpx_parser.py hors scope T22/T23). Le défaut 500m s'applique. Cible: task wiring end-to-end.

title: SlowAPI limiter 429s the test suite once /share/save 500 is fixed
detail: Fixing the request-param collision made @limiter.limit('10/minute') actually enforce, so multi-POST tests (uniqueness=10, concurrency=5, metadata) started returning 429 under the single TestClient remote address. Fix: autouse fixture in test_share.py toggling limiter.enabled=False for the suite (restored after). Production limiter untouched. Pattern to reuse for any endpoint under SlowAPI that has hammering tests.

title: Spec Smoke payload used wrong field ({track_data} vs model {state_json})
detail: T24 Smoke asserted POST /share/save {"track_data":{...}} -> 200, but SaveStateRequest requires state_json, so that literal yields 422 not 200. Ran smoke with correct {state_json} to prove 200 (fix) AND kept {track_data} case to prove it's now 422 not 500. Speccer should derive smoke payloads from the actual Pydantic model.

title: Follow-up tasks blocked because prior-run PRs stay DRAFT/unmerged
detail: T25 depends on T22 (#10), T26 on T23 (#11); both PRs from run-001 are still draft, so the dependent code isn't on main and the follow-ups can't run. Review-generated follow-ups that touch prior-PR code can't execute until those PRs merge. Consider gating such tasks or auto-stacking on the base branch.
